description:
Strict seccomp profile for untrusted agent containers (openclaw/claudecode).

Blocks dangerous syscalls while allowing normal application operation and
iptables (NET_ADMIN) for the internal egress firewall (init-firewall.sh).

Defense-in-depth with cap_drop:ALL + cap_add:[NET_ADMIN,NET_RAW]:
  - Blocks kernel module loading, mount/namespace escapes, eBPF, ptrace
  - Host FORWARD chain is the immutable backstop (agent cannot touch it)
  - Even if agent flushes its own iptables, host rules still enforce SSH allowlist

syscalls.comment: Blocked syscalls: kernel modules, mounts, namespaces, eBPF, ptrace, keyring, reboot. unshare blocks namespace creation (defense-in-depth even with NET_ADMIN for iptables).
